title: cymbidium lycopodioides
intro: Cymbidium lycopodioides, also known as the clubmass orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving fever, reducing inflammation, and treating respiratory issues. Cymbidium lycopodioides can be prepared as a herbal remedy in forms such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments.
